action.command:
cd /workspace/YatCC && python3 << 'PYEOF'
import re

with open('build/test/task0/functional-0/000_main.sysu.c', 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()
    lines = content.split('\n')
    
    currentFile = ''
    currentLine = 1
    # Build a map from preprocessed line number to {filename, line}
    lineMap = {}
    
    for i, line in enumerate(lines):
        match = re.match(r'^\s*#\s*(\d+)\s+"([^"]*)".*', line)
        if match:
            currentLine = int(match.group(1))
            currentFile = match.group(2)
            # Don't increment for directive lines
            continue
        
        # Map preprocessed line i+1 to {currentFile, currentLine}
        lineMap[i+1] = (currentFile, currentLine)
        currentLine += 1
    
    # ANTLR gives us line 8 for 'int'
    # lineMap[8] = ('/workspace/YatCC/test/cases/functional-0/000_main.sysu.c', 1)
    # This is correct!
    
    print('ANTLR line 8 ->', lineMap.get(8, 'NOT FOUND'))
    print('ANTLR line 9 ->', lineMap.get(9, 'NOT FOUND'))
    print('ANTLR line 10 ->', lineMap.get(10, 'NOT FOUND'))
PYEOF
